violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in the dry storage/liquor room is bare wood and unsealed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items stored on the floor in the liquor/dry storage area. Single-use items in the kitchen area under fan with the food contact surface face-up. Need to be inverted to prevent contamination.--Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Reusing beer box and other single use boxes to hold sauces in the beer cooler.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
